executives.name: Doug Reddy
executives.background: Mr. Reddy is a professional geologist with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He has held senior roles at Endeavour Mining and Endeavour Financial.

executives.name: Lenard Boggio
executives.background: Former partner at PwC where he led the mining practice. Experienced director for several public mining companies.

executives.name: Peter Hardie
executives.background: Mr. Hardie is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 20 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously CFO of True Gold Mining Inc.

executives.name: Rhylin Bailie
executives.background: Ms. Bailie has over 25 years of experience in investor relations and communications for mining companies, including roles at NovaGold Resources and Goldcorp.

executives.name: Wesley Clark
executives.background: Retired General, US Army. Former Supreme Allied Commander Europe of NATO. Extensive experience in strategic leadership.

executives.name: Darren Hall
executives.background: Mr. Hall has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously Chief Operating Officer of Kirkland Lake Gold and has held senior roles at Newmont Mining Corporation.

executives.name: Greg Smith
executives.background: Mr. Smith is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 25 years of experience in finance and the mining sector. He was previously President of JDL Gold Corp. and CFO of Minefinders Corporation Ltd.

board_of_directors.name: Lenard Boggio
board_of_directors.background: Former partner at PwC where he led the mining practice. Experienced director for several public mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: Ross Beaty
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Beaty is a geologist and resource entrepreneur with over 45 years of experience in the international minerals and renewable energy industries. He founded Pan American Silver Corp. and Alterra Power Corp.

board_of_directors.name: Wesley Clark
board_of_directors.background: Retired General, US Army. Former Supreme Allied Commander Europe of NATO. Extensive experience in strategic leadership.

board_of_directors.name: Blayne Johnson
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Johnson has over 30 years of experience in the capital markets and mining sector. He was a founder of Newmarket Gold and has been involved in numerous successful mining ventures.

board_of_directors.name: Douglas Forster
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Forster has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He was the President and CEO of Newmarket Gold and has served on several public company boards.

board_of_directors.name: Greg Smith
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Smith is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 25 years of experience in finance and the mining sector. He was previously President of JDL Gold Corp. and CFO of Minefinders Corporation Ltd.

board_of_directors.name: Maryse Bélanger
board_of_directors.background: Over 30 years of experience in the mining sector. Former President and CEO of Augusta Gold and COO of Atlantic Gold.
